title: How Danica Patrick detoxed from implants

chunks.title: Post-Surgery Recovery and Energy Boost
chunks.summary: The speaker describes their immediate feelings of relief and increased energy after undergoing surgery to remove implants. They experienced significant changes such as increased natural oil production in their skin and improved thyroid function shortly after the procedure.
chunks.transcript: finally in april of 2022 i had my implants removed and like within that night after i had them removed my face started producing its own natural natural oils again um because my face was i i i didn't know it was dry but obviously it was my scalp had been dry for like two years and nothing i did would fix that so my face started producing oil again which was like amazing um i woke up in the morning and i just had so more energy i'm always like i always do everything i need to do and i never i'm never too tired really um and so but i got up and i had all the natural energy like you know how you feel when you just kind of are in your stride and you're like ready to go and you're almost antsy in a way like oh i just let's just do something you know i didn't feel like that for years i kind of felt like this labored energy where i'd be like okay get up danica go work out you gotta go do this clean your room and so i had this natural energy within 12 hours of surgery and i just felt amazing right away i was losing i was peeing 25 times a day because i was getting rid of inflammation um so so anyway it was like already so much relief right away i've learned that it comes in waves now healing comes in waves with um detoxing because it's not like you get them removed and then all of a sudden all the problems are gone but at least now i've taken out a large culprit and i now the things that i do are working like actually 13 days after surgery was over with i did labs and my thyroid numbers came up just within a range for the first time and i'm like okay at least it's doing something so

chunks.title: Doctor's Opinions on Implant Illness
chunks.summary: The speaker discusses their interactions with various doctors regarding the possibility of breast implant illness. Despite their concerns, doctors suggested alternative treatments before considering the surgery, indicating a lack of belief in the connection between the implants and the speaker's health issues.
chunks.transcript: things started improving again healing is not linear and it goes in waves but it's definitely working now so i've got some cleanup work to do but it's like far better far better along the way did any of the doctors your ob anybody you saw say have you thought about breast implant no illness i brought it up i brought it up to every one of them and i thought well could this be it um and they're all like no probably not they're like i mean maybe but let's try these other things first right and i can't blame them for saying let's try these other things because the alternative is surgery right um but none of them brought it up and um and none of them none of them believed that was the case and what year did you get the implants

chunks.title: Understanding Silicone Implants
chunks.summary: The conversation shifts to the differences between silicone and saline implants, focusing on potential health issues associated with each type. The speaker highlights concerns over mold growth in saline implants and discusses personal experiences with autoimmune responses related to silicone implants.

chunks.summary: The speaker shares insights from a recent genetic analysis revealing pathways that may explain their adverse reactions to breast implants. They discuss specific genetic markers and how these affect their body's ability to detoxify and recover from stressors.

chunks.title: Reflection on Health Choices
chunks.summary: In this segment, the speaker reflects on the general state of health among people who consume less than ideal diets. They express admiration for the body's resilience and the importance of maintaining good health, while also sharing their desire to optimize their well-being.
chunks.transcript: doing so i stay very energized through the things that i'm doing and i haven't he said that there was someone else that he works with that um is uh like an extreme marathoner and or triathlete and she was doing this run where other people were dying and the ambulance got her at one point and as soon as she could stand up she just started running again and she has a similar pathways to me so he's like you don't know if you don't feel good you don't you're just you're just so you're able to push through at any cost so now he's like you probably would feel you two people with the same exact issue you versus someone else with different pathways and you feel fine but this person might not be able to get out of bed so i kept pushing pushing so how long did i feel bad how long was my body not working right probably the whole time but like the body's amazing and it's amazing like you think about the garbage that a lot of people eat i mean even the people that eat healthy you're probably thinking like if somebody's crushing vegetables either they're doing better than almost everyone in the world right but you're like there's it's still garbage and so imagine now that like these there's people that never eat well in their whole entire life and they live till they're 90. it's like the body is amazing actually and so but i push it really hard and i expect a lot of it and so um so i don't think that most of people would go to the doctor for what i went to the doctor for because i just i'm i didn't feel too bad but i really want to feel good i really want to look good i want to feel good i want to operate well and i want to live really
